programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Festive drama. Dr Sharon Hayes's quest for a family heirloom leads her to team up with a little girl and her disheartened father. Along the way, they uncover the true magic of Christmas. (2019)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Normal People: Jonathan and Mark's next assignment takes them to a halfway house for people who were confined to mental facilities. Although they were released, they have not been treated.
